_comment: Coverage floors for the ratchet (scripts/cover_check.py). 'packages' = load-bearing floors (service layer, auth): STRICT, no epsilon, may only go up — bless a gain with `make cover-update`. 'advisory' = thin layers (handlers) reported for visibility but NOT gated, so the teeth stay on the service layer. Baselines = state when blessed; the gate catches NEW regressions. Only DB-free unit-test packages are tracked so the gate runs without Postgres.
